message.content:
Explore the frontend at C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\ focusing on:

1. Current chat-related files:
   - contexts/ChatContext.tsx (full content)
   - components/ChatPanel/ChatPanel.tsx (full content) 
   - components/ChatMessage/ChatMessage.tsx (full content)
   - components/ChatInput/ChatInput.tsx (full content)
   - components/ConversationList/ConversationList.tsx (full content)
   - data/mockConversations.ts (full content)
   - All their .module.scss files

2. Router setup (router.tsx)

3. The current sidebar component (Sidebar.tsx) to understand how chat fits in

4. How existing pages are structured (Landing, Search, CandidateProfile) — patterns for page layout

5. styles/_tokens.scss — theme variables available

Return full file contents.

content.text: I'll explore the frontend structure focusing on chat-related files, routing, and component patterns. Let me start by reading the key files you mentioned.
